name: TraceProof Runtime
description: Creates one TraceProof conversation trace per OpenClaw session, injects TraceProof grounding automatically, and issues verified inbound/outbound message proofs.

apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the TraceProof API.

oauthTokenUrl.description: OAuth2 token endpoint for TraceProof client credentials flow.

oauthScope.description: OAuth2 scope sent when requesting a TraceProof access token.

oauthResource.description: OAuth2 resource / audience for TraceProof API access.

oauthClientAuthMethod.description: OAuth2 client authentication method at the token endpoint.

agentId.description: TraceProof agent id used to create traces and message proofs.

credentialKey.description: TraceProof credential key used to authenticate trace and proof creation.

channel.description: TraceProof channel value sent on conversation trace creation.

sourceSystem.description: Source system label recorded on trace creation.

originLabel.description: Origin label recorded on trace creation.

qrFormat.description: Preferred QR format to store in session state.

verifyProofs.description: If true, verifies each issued message proof immediately after issue.
